title: ExNihiloSequentiaTempFix-421856
description: This is a project to provide fixed and back-ported version of ExNihilo: Sequentia. Since the original author has been inactive and cannot be reached by any means and left unusable versions for a year, now I try to provide some.
body:
This is a project to provide fixed and back-ported version of ExNihilo: Sequentia. Since the original author has been inactive and cannot be reached by any means and left unusable versions for a year, now I try to provide some. 

This project backport original mod's 1.21.4 version to 1.21.1. So now you're able to play ExNihilo: Sequentia under MC 1.21.1.

This mod also enable the prismarine crook and hammer, which the original project's author haven't release this change.

This mod brings more independent durability configuration, and accept proposals that asking for more configuration items.

In order to run the mod, you should download my NovaCore from another modrinth page.

Also, localization of Simplified Chinese is fully updated.

I don't guarantee any future updates so this will be kind of archived project.

The original project: https://modrinth.com/mod/exnihilosequentia

My source code repo: https://github.com/LiuJiewenTT/ExNihiloSequentia
